description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a matte white background, covered in realistic water droplets that suggest condensation from cold storage. The front of the can features the iconic red Coca-Cola script logo, with a dynamic splash graphic of a glass filled with cola and ice cubes, reinforcing the beverage's refreshing quality. The top of the can is black, contrasting with the white body, and is also dotted with water droplets. The sides and back of the can are mostly plain white, with the logo partially visible as it wraps around the surface. The can's surface is smooth and hard, typical of beverage cans, and the water droplets add a tactile, slightly bumpy texture. This object is commonly found in urban environments such as vending machines, convenience stores, and public parks.
description: A cold, white Coca-Cola can with condensation droplets, featuring a red logo and a splash graphic of cola and ice on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full Coca-Cola logo and a splash graphic of cola and ice, with heavy condensation droplets.
description_view_1: Side view with partial red logo visible on the left edge, mostly plain white surface with scattered water droplets.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain white can surface, fully covered in condensation droplets, with no visible branding.
description_view_3: Angled view with the Coca-Cola logo partially visible, showing both the logo and the plain white side with condensation.
attribute_brand_logo: Coca-Cola script logo in red, located prominently on the front of the can, large and horizontally oriented.
attribute_flavor_indication: Graphic of a glass with cola and ice on the front, indicating a cola flavor.
